author: gleaning
text:
Trim chrono to default-features=false

Every chrono use is Utc::now, DateTime<Utc>, RFC3339 parse/format, with_timezone(&Utc), and Duration arithmetic — all core or the 'now' feature. No Local or system-timezone use anywhere, so the default 'clock' feature's iana-time-zone dependency was dead weight.

features=[now,std,serde] preserves the full surface in use; iana-time-zone drops from the normal tree (40 -> 39 crates) with no behavior change. Part of the jq+git+ln footprint audit (epic bl-32f8).
